very.title: Verify with palm scan
very.description: Scan your palm once with VeryAI to join any community that requires it. The photo is not saved anywhere.

passport.title: Score Too Low
passport.description: Your wallet needs a Passport score of 20+ to enter this community. Visit app.passport.xyz to improve it.

descriptions.default: Self.xyz lets you prove facts like age and nationality without sharing your name, photo, or document details with anyone.
descriptions.ageOver18: Self.xyz lets you prove you are over 18 without sharing your name, photo, or document details with anyone.
descriptions.minimumAge: Self.xyz lets you prove your age without sharing your name, photo, or document details with anyone.
descriptions.nationality: Self.xyz lets you prove your nationality without sharing your name, photo, or document details with anyone.
descriptions.gender: Self.xyz lets you prove facts from your ID without sharing your name, photo, or document details with anyone.
descriptions.multiple: Self.xyz lets you prove {capabilities} without sharing your name, photo, or document details with anyone.

panel.joinableDescription: You meet this community's access requirements.
panel.requestableDescription: Ask the moderators to approve your membership.
panel.pendingRequestDescription: The moderators will review your request.
panel.gateFailedDescription: You do not meet this community's access requirements.
panel.bannedDescription: You are not eligible to join this community.
panel.selfDescription: Complete the ID check, then return to join.
panel.requestSubmittedDescription: Your join request has been submitted.
panel.passportPromptDescription: Are you human? Improve your wallet score and try again.

gateFailure.nationalityMismatch: Your verified ID does not match this community's requirement.
gateFailure.genderMismatch: Your ID check does not match this community's rule.
gateFailure.minimumAgeMismatch: Your verified age does not match this community's requirement.
gateFailure.providerNotAccepted: Your existing verification does not satisfy this community's requirement.
gateFailure.unsupported: This community uses a gate your current verification cannot satisfy here yet.
gateFailure.erc721HoldingRequired: Connect an Ethereum wallet that holds this NFT to join this community.
gateFailure.erc721InventoryMatchRequired: Connect a wallet that holds the required Courtyard collectibles to join.
gateFailure.tokenInventoryUnavailable: Courtyard collectible inventory could not be checked right now.
gateFailure.walletScoreTooLow: Your Passport score does not meet this community's requirement.
gateFailure.banned: You are not eligible to join this community.
